title: epidendrum mantiqueranum
intro: Epidendrum mantiqueranum, also known as the "Queen of the Andes," is a species of orchid native to the Andes mountains in South America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion and nausea. The health benefits of Epidendrum mantiqueranum include its potential to alleviate gastrointestinal issues, improve appetite, and reduce inflammation. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion, often combined with other herbs, to be used as a treatment for digestive issues.
